description: Lock fine_arts_medieval to Romanesque and Gothic fine arts from the eleventh century onward, not generic early medieval art since 500 CE.

checks.reason: The source-backed scope is Romanesque art of the eleventh and twelfth centuries, with later Gothic art evolving from it.
Classical sculpture is earlier lineage and contrast for Romanesque sculpture, not a direct enabling technique.
Early Insular illuminated manuscripts are anchored before the corrected Romanesque/Gothic fine-arts scope.
Music notation and early polyphony are not direct dependents of the corrected Romanesque/Gothic visual fine-arts scope.
